abstract: The connection status of the session.
overview:
## Discussion

Observe this property to monitor the session’s connection status, as well as obtain disconnection reasons. The default value is [doc://com.apple.FoveatedStreaming/documentation/FoveatedStreaming/FoveatedStreamingSession/Status-swift.enum/initialized].

For example, you can display a view that’s only visible when the session is fully connected:

You can obtain the disconnect reason whenever the session disconnects as follows:
title: status
